problem id: 004ef7c7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) XOR NOT SHL(3)) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  11101001 -> 01111101
  11010100 -> 11111110
  00110011 -> 00000111
  00111000 -> 01001111
  00101011 -> 11110101
  00100010 -> 10101111
  10000010 -> 11111010
  00001010 -> 10111011

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 11111111
